title: crataegus intricata var. horseyi
intro: Crataegus intricata var. horseyi, also known as the hawthorn tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus intricata var. horseyi include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving symptoms of menopause, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Crataegus intricata var. horseyi include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
